recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure on Excess Power PPA
recommendations.description: Disclose detailed information on the Assam government PPA and unutilized power payments in the upcoming BRSR FY26 filing to mitigate SEBI scrutiny and avoid trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids potential cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps, saving approximately ₹250-500 Cr in financing costs over 3 years.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power improved disclosures leading to P/E rerating

recommendations.title: Launch Proactive ESG Communication Campaign
recommendations.description: Initiate a transparent stakeholder communication program highlighting the company's management of the Assam PPA risk and sustainability initiatives to improve ESG ratings and investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings can reduce fund outflows, potentially preserving ₹500-700 Cr in market cap valuation.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power’s ESG narrative led to valuation premium

recommendations.title: Develop Renewable Energy Transition Roadmap
recommendations.description: Commit to increasing renewable portfolio to at least 50% by 2030, aligning with EU Taxonomy to unlock green financing and reduce transition risks.
recommendations.profitability_link: Access to green bonds and lower cost of capital could save ₹300-400 Cr in interest over 5 years.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power’s 80% renewable commitment and ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance

recommendations.title: Implement TCFD-Aligned Climate Risk Reporting
recommendations.description: Integrate TCFD recommendations into annual reports to improve transparency on transition and regulatory risks, reducing FII outflows and P/E compression.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigates P/E compression of 5-10%, preserving ₹1000-1500 Cr in market valuation.

immediate_high.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure on Excess Power PPA
